column5:
This is gearing up to be my favorite year of CIFF yet. As I'm in my fourth and final year of undergrad, I have no idea where I'll be a year from now, so I'm going into this with the mindset of living CIFF up to the fullest in the potential (but unconfirmed) event that I don't live in Chicago time come October 2026. I'm going all out and so fucking excited.

As per usual, will turn into a ranked list once the festival arrives!
